entities.name: SRI RAMA SAGAR PROJECT
entities.description: Multipurpose project constructed across the Godavari River to irrigate an ayacut of 9,68,640 Acres

entities.name: GODAVARI RIVER
entities.description: The river across which the Sri Rama Sagar Project is constructed

entities.name: POCHAMPAD
entities.description: Village near the Sri Rama Sagar Project

entities.name: BALKONDA
entities.description: Mandal near the Sri Rama Sagar Project

entities.name: NIZAMABAD
entities.description: District covered by the Sri Rama Sagar Project command area

entities.description: District covered by the Sri Rama Sagar Project command area

entities.description: District covered by the Sri Rama Sagar Project command area

entities.description: District covered by the Sri Rama Sagar Project command area

entities.name: TELANGANA
entities.description: State where the Sri Rama Sagar Project is located

entities.name: CROP INTENSITY
entities.description: The measure of double crop or single crop within the command area

entities.name: GEOSPATIAL TOOLS
entities.description: Tools used for the change detection of crop intensity

entities.name: MODIS 250M
entities.description: Coarse resolution multispectral temporal satellite data used for analysis

entities.name: SPECTRAL MATCHING TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Method used for classification by comparing ideal spectral signatures

entities.name: NDVI VALUES
entities.description: Normalized Difference Vegetation Index values used in spectral matching

entities.name: GOOGLE EARTH
entities.description: Tool used for classification and verification

entities.name: CHANGE DETECTION
entities.description: The process of assessing and mapping changes in crop intensity over time

entities.name: IRRIGATED YEARS
entities.description: Years during which the command area was irrigated

entities.name: NON IRRIGATED YEARS
entities.description: Years during which the command area was not irrigated
